<recommended_plugins>
Here is a list of plugins that are available but not installed. If the user's query would benefit from one of these plugins, use the `request_plugin_install` tool to suggest that they install it. Pass the parenthesized ID as `plugin_id`. For example, suggest the Google Drive plugin if the query could possibly be better answered with access to Google Drive.

- Atlassian Rovo (atlassian-rovo@openai-curated-remote)
- Box (box@openai-curated-remote)
- Gmail (gmail@openai-curated-remote)
- Google Calendar (google-calendar@openai-curated-remote)
- Outlook Calendar (outlook-calendar@openai-curated-remote)
- Outlook Email (outlook-email@openai-curated-remote)
- SharePoint (sharepoint@openai-curated-remote)
- Teams (teams@openai-curated-remote)
</recommended_plugins>
i want you to go through the codebase with 10 different code-reaper subagents and tell me what we should clean up in this codebase to make it more maintainable.

I’m applying the code-reaper workflow to the repository’s tooling, CI, configuration, docs, and hygiene layer. I’ll keep this read-only and separate necessary generated/deployment complexity from cleanup candidates.

input.input: const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"pwd && rg --files -g '!node_modules' -g '!target' -g '!dist' -g '!build' | sed -n '1,260p'","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"find . -maxdepth 3 -type f \\( -path './.git/*' -o -path './web/node_modules/*' -o -path './target/*' \\) -prune -o -type f -print | sort | sed -n '1,320p'","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"git status --short --ignored | sed -n '1,260p'; git ls-files | sed -n '1,320p'","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"for f in Cargo.toml api/Cargo.toml cli/Cargo.toml crates/scope-core/Cargo.toml worker/Cargo.toml web/package.json .gitignore .env.example README.md dev/README.md bench/README.md post-pre-alpha.md; do echo \"### $f\"; nl -ba \"$f\" | sed -n '1,240p'; done","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"for f in .github/workflows/*.yml .github/scripts/*.sh api/railpack.json worker/railpack.json web/railpack.json cli/railpack.json cli/scripts/build-railway.sh rust-toolchain.toml api/rust-toolchain.toml cli/rust-toolchain.toml web/tsconfig.json web/tsconfig.test.json web/vite.config.ts web/pnpm-workspace.yaml web/doctor.config.json web/konsistent.json web/components.json; do echo \"### $f\"; nl -ba \"$f\" | sed -n '1,300p'; done","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"for d in anyhow axum base64 chacha20poly1305 flate2 futures_util hex hmac http jsonwebtoken getrandom reqwest sea_orm sea_orm_migration serde serde_json sha1 sha2 similar sqlx thiserror time tokio tokio_stream tower_http tracing tracing_subscriber; do printf '%-22s ' \"$d\"; rg -l \"(^|[^[:alnum:]_])${d}(::|[^[:alnum:]_])\" api/src api/tests | wc -l; done; command -v cargo-machete || true; cargo machete --version 2>/dev/null || true","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"for f in web/scripts/check-api-contract.mjs web/scripts/check-line-limit.mjs web/scripts/ui-audit.mjs dev/scope-dev bench/phase0.mjs; do echo \"### $f ($(wc -l < \"$f\") lines)\"; nl -ba \"$f\" | sed -n '1,260p'; done","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"nl -ba cli/distribution/targets.json | sed -n '1,240p'; rg -n \"x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu|aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu|x86_64-apple-darwin|aarch64-apple-darwin|x86_64-pc-windows-msvc|aarch64-pc-windows-msvc\" cli .github README.md | sed -n '1,260p'","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"nl -ba cli/src/distribution.rs | sed -n '1,190p'; rg -n \"targets.json|DistributionManifest|target.*manifest|include_str\" cli/src cli/tests","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"rg -n \"\\.railway-upload/cli|railway-upload/web|railway-upload/api|railway-upload/worker|build-railway\" .github README.md cli web api worker; du -sh docs docs/superpowers/specs; find docs/superpowers/specs -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f %s bytes\\n' | sort","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"rg -n \"konsistent|check:api-contract|pnpm check\" .github README.md web/package.json; rg -n \"repos\\.\\$owner\\.\\$repo\\.review|review\\.tsx\" web docs README.md || true; git log -1 --format='%h %cs %s' -- docs/superpowers/specs/*.html docs/superpowers/specs/*.md | head","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"sed -n '1,30p' web/src/api/types.generated.ts; sed -n '1,30p' web/src/routeTree.gen.ts; rg -n \"types.generated|routeTree.gen|generate.*type|export_api_types\" README.md web api .github | sed -n '1,220p'; wc -l README.md dev/README.md .github/workflows/*.yml .github/scripts/deploy-railway.sh","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"for p in '@clerk/tanstack-react-start' '@pierre/diffs' '@radix-ui/react-alert-dialog' '@radix-ui/react-slot' '@radix-ui/react-switch' '@radix-ui/react-toggle-group' '@radix-ui/react-tooltip' '@tailwindcss/vite' '@tanstack/react-router' '@tanstack/react-start' 'class-variance-authority' 'clsx' 'lucide-react' 'react-dom' 'sonner' 'tailwind-merge' 'tailwindcss'; do printf '%-36s ' \"$p\"; rg -l -F \"$p\" web/src web/vite.config.ts web/scripts 2>/dev/null | wc -l; done; rg -n \"from ['\\\"](class-variance-authority|clsx|sonner|tailwind-merge|lucide-react)['\\\"]\" web/src | head -100","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

content.text:
Tooling/docs audit complete. No P0 findings.

1. **P1 — CLI target metadata has three sources of truth.** Runtime targets live in [targets.json](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/cli/distribution/targets.json:2), but triples/artifacts are repeated in [scope-cli-build.yml](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/.github/workflows/scope-cli-build.yml:93) and again in its checksum list at [line 214](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/.github/workflows/scope-cli-build.yml:214). Runtime readiness derives required artifacts from the JSON manifest in [distribution.rs](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/cli/src/distribution.rs:26). Drift can make a successful build undeployable. Generate the CI matrix/checksum list from the manifest, or validate equivalence in one script.

2. **P1 — Web PR CI skips the production build.** `pnpm build` is main-only in [scope-web-ci.yml](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/.github/workflows/scope-web-ci.yml:76). Vite/TanStack/Nitro build failures can merge before surfacing. Run the build on PRs; keep only deployment conditional.

3. **P2 — The advertised web quality gate differs from CI.** [package.json](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/web/package.json:13) defines `pnpm check` to include Konsistent, and [README.md](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/README.md:30) calls it canonical. CI manually restates only some checks at [scope-web-ci.yml](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/.github/workflows/scope-web-ci.yml:64); no workflow enforces [konsistent.json](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/web/konsistent.json:4). Have CI invoke the canonical command or explicitly add the missing gate.

4. **P2 — Railway staging duplicates entire deploy trees.** Web copies its tree both to upload root and `/web` in [scope-web-ci.yml](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/.github/workflows/scope-web-ci.yml:94), although root Railpack builds the root package. CLI creates a complete root at [scope-cli-build.yml](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/.github/workflows/scope-cli-build.yml:242), then duplicates CLI and core under `/cli` at [line 252](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/.github/workflows/scope-cli-build.yml:252), while [cli/railpack.json](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/cli/railpack.json:4) builds from root. No consumer references the nested copies. Remove them and correct [README.md](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/README.md:96). API/worker workspace-member copies are necessary.

5. **P2 — API retains unused direct dependencies.** Exact source searches found no API references to `chacha20poly1305`, `sea-orm`, `sea-orm-migration`, `similar`, `sqlx`, or `thiserror`, declared in [api/Cargo.toml](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/api/Cargo.toml:17). They appear to remain from extraction into `scope-core`. `tokio-stream` also has no references in `scope-core` despite its declaration at [scope-core/Cargo.toml](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/crates/scope-core/Cargo.toml:36). Remove individually and verify check/test/clippy.

6. **P2 — Toolchain versions are multiply owned.** Rust 1.94 is repeated in the root, API, CLI, and three workflows; Node 24 and pnpm 11.1 are repeated in [package.json](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/web/package.json:6), [railpack.json](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/web/railpack.json:4), and workflow setup. Delete the redundant API toolchain file and make automation consume checked-in metadata.

7. **P3 — React Doctor has a stale suppression.** [doctor.config.json](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/web/doctor.config.json:5) exempts `repos.$owner.$repo.review.tsx`, which no longer exists. Delete it.

8. **P3 — Minor script/docs cleanup.** [package.json](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/web/package.json:15) exposes two names for the same Konsistent command. Historical specs contain obsolete paths; index/archive them as historical material rather than deleting design history indiscriminately.

Necessary complexity retained: generated API types have ownership and freshness checks; TanStack’s route tree is clearly generated; the cross-platform CLI build itself is justified; Railway deployment polling/logging has real health semantics.
